{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Nakothi's Intent
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Damaging [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] releases [[Nakothi's Intent]], which results in a horrible death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|If you do? “Nakothi’s Intent will be released, and you will die a horrible death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
